en_title: Star Trek: Shadow Frontier — Paramount Says 'The Goal Is for Bloober to Make the Best Star Trek Game of All Time'
cn_title: 《星际迷航：暗影边境》瞄准系列最佳
subtitle: 剑指史上最佳
opus_summary: 派拉蒙游戏工作室联手Bloober Team公布《星际迷航：暗影边境》，由Michelle 《福布斯》回归饰演罗·拉伦，定位心理惊悚类似《地狱之刃》。

paragraphs.en: Revealed exclusively at IGN Live , Star Trek: Shadow Frontier is the surprise upcoming game from Bloober Team, the developer of the critically and commercially acclaimed Silent Hill 2 remake, and Cronos: The New Dawn. It stars Michelle Forbes, who reprises her role as Trek fan-favorite character Ro Laren and finds herself stranded on an alien planet. The newly formed Paramount Games Studio, which includes all Paramount and Skydance gaming studios, has invested heavily in the game, and, as Shawn Kittelsen, senior vice president, head of creative and production at Paramount Games Studio told IGN ahead of the reveal, it certainly has high hopes for it.
paragraphs.cn: 在IGN Live上独家公布的《星际迷航：暗影边境》是Bloober Team的惊喜新作，该工作室此前开发了口碑与销量双丰收的《寂静岭 2》重制版和《克洛诺斯：新黎明》。本作由Michelle 《福布斯》主演，她将再次饰演星迷们最爱的角色罗·拉伦（Ro Laren），并被困在一个外星星球上。新成立的派拉蒙游戏工作室囊括了派拉蒙和Skydance旗下的所有游戏工作室，已为该项目投入重金。正如派拉蒙游戏工作室创意与制作高级副总裁Shawn Kittelsen在公布前向IGN透露的那样，他们对这款游戏寄予了厚望。

paragraphs.en: “The goal is for Bloober to make the best Star Trek game of all time, if we can bring that to life,” Kittelsen said. There have been many, many Star Trek games over the years, and everyone will have their own favorites. Birth of the Federation, 25th Anniversary, Judgment Rites, Bridge Commander, Armada, Starfleet Academy, Star Trek Online… the list goes on. Paramount, though, wants to top them all.
paragraphs.cn: 「目标就是让Bloober打造出有史以来最好的《星际迷航》游戏，如果我们能做到的话，」Kittelsen说道。多年来已有无数《星际迷航》游戏问世，每个人心中都有自己最爱的作品——《星际迷航：联邦的诞生》《25周年纪念版》《正义审判》《舰桥指挥官》《舰队》《星舰学院》《星际迷航Online》……不一而足。但派拉蒙想要超越所有这些。

paragraphs.en: To that end, Star Trek: Shadow Frontier is different from previous Star Trek games. It’s from Bloober, a horror specialist, but Kittelsen says it’s more of a “psychological thriller.” He compares it to Ninja Theory’s Hellblade series, rather than Bloober’s previous hits like Silent Hill 2.
paragraphs.cn: 为此，《星际迷航：暗影边境》与以往的《星际迷航》游戏截然不同。它出自恐怖游戏专家Bloober之手，但Kittelsen表示它更像一部「心理惊悚」作品。他将其与Ninja Theory的《地狱之刃》系列相提并论，而非Bloober此前的热门作品如《寂静岭 2》。

paragraphs.en: “It's interesting, Star Trek has had so many permutations over the years,” Kittelsen said. “It can kind of genre bend. It's the rare sci-fi show that can do a Sherlock Holmes Victorian era mystery as well as interplanetary warfare on an epic scale. And everything in between. Bloober has an incredible track record in the horror space… Silent Hill 2 remake, Cronos: The New Dawn I thought was really well done and showed them pushing into sci-fi horror. I think we consider Star Trek: Shadow Frontier more of a psychological thriller than a horror game, sort of akin to Hellblade in a lot of ways.”
paragraphs.cn: 「有趣的是，《星际迷航》多年来经历了如此多的演变，」Kittelsen说，「它几乎可以混合各种类型。这是一部罕见的科幻剧集，既能演绎福尔摩斯式的维多利亚时代谜案，也能展现宏大的星际战争，以及介于两者之间的一切。Bloober在恐怖领域有着令人难以置信的履历……《寂静岭 2》重制版、《克洛诺斯：新黎明》，我认为都做得相当出色，展现了他们向科幻恐怖领域大胆进军。我认为我们将《星际迷航：暗影边境》更多地视为一部心理惊悚游戏，而非恐怖游戏，在很多方面类似于《地狱之刃》。

paragraphs.en: So, expect plenty of “conflict within yourself” moments from Ro Laren in a game that will show Bloober “has more range.”
paragraphs.cn: 因此，你可以期待罗·拉伦（Ro Laren）在游戏中经历大量「内心冲突」时刻，而这款游戏也将展现Bloober「拥有更多的实力广度」。

paragraphs.en: “If you look at the history of Star Trek, a lot of fans and writers always would grumble about the Roddenberry rule, where Gene Roddenberry famously did not want interpersonal conflict between crew members,” Kittelsen said. “But where that drove a lot of storytelling in the original series and in The Next Generation was into this sort of inward journey of intrapersonal conflict, like conflict within yourself.
paragraphs.cn: 「回顾《星际迷航》的历史，很多粉丝和编剧总是抱怨罗登贝瑞规则——吉恩·罗登贝瑞著名地不希望船员之间有私人矛盾，」Kittelsen说。「但这也促使原初系列和《下一代》中的许多故事走向了这种内心旅程，即内心冲突，就像与自己作斗争。」

paragraphs.en: “Ro Laren’s character, who's played by Michelle Forbes, who we're bringing back from The Next Generation, never got her moment in the spotlight enough for the fans who loved her on The Next Generation. So bringing her back and having an adventure focused on her, and then giving her that deeper inner psychological conflict to work with, and making that the centerpiece for the psychological thriller where she has to survive on a strange planet, is right up Bloober's alley. And I think this is a game that's going to show that Bloober has more range, that they don't need to be pigeonholed in a horror category. They're trying to flex to a different place and show what they can do.
paragraphs.cn: 「由Michelle 《福布斯》饰演的罗·拉伦（Ro Laren）角色，我们将从《下一代》中把她带回来。她在《下一代》中一直没有得到足够让喜欢她的粉丝们满意的聚光灯时刻。所以，让她回归，并将冒险聚焦于她，同时赋予她更深层次的内心冲突，并以此作为心理惊悚的核心，让她在一个陌生星球上求生，这简直是为Bloober量身定做的。我认为这款游戏将展示Bloober拥有更丰富的可能性，他们不需要被局限在恐怖这一类型中。他们正努力向新的领域拓展，展示自己的能力。」

paragraphs.en: “And because of Trek’s innate qualities and the fact that there is a hopefulness and a really strong sense of positive and optimistic values that come through when you're part of Starfleet. That thread as well, you can go really, really dark at Star Trek, but it always has to have some anchor in the light of boldly going, and not boldly going to seek and destroy, but boldly going to understand and communicate.
paragraphs.cn: 「而且，由于《星际迷航》的固有特质，以及当你成为星际舰队一员时，那种充满希望和强烈积极乐观的价值观贯穿始终。即便如此，你可以在《星际迷航》中走得非常非常黑暗，但它始终必须锚定在勇往直前的光明之中——不是勇往直前地去寻找和摧毁，而是勇往直前地去理解和沟通。」

paragraphs.en: “That is going to show people a new side of what Bloober can do. But it's also a chance for Bloober to bring the things that they've been doing really well in their latest games, the incredible production values, the really strong cinematic storytelling and just rock solid third-person action, all of those pieces will come together, I think, for a very special game that's going to be unexpected for a lot of Trek fans and a lot of Bloober fans.”
paragraphs.cn: 「这将向人们展示Bloober的全新一面。但这也是Bloober的一个机会，将他们最近游戏中表现优异的元素——惊人的制作水准、极强的电影化叙事，以及扎实的第三人称动作——汇聚到一起。我认为所有这些将共同造就一款非常特别的游戏，会让许多《星际迷航》粉丝和Bloober粉丝都意想不到。」

paragraphs.en: Paramount Games Studio had its big step-out moment last week, where it announced its existence with the reveal of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin from Bayonetta developer PlatinumGames. Turtles is very early in development, but Star Trek: Shadow Frontier is further along, Kittelsen said. This was a licensed game that was already in the works when Paramount formed its new video game division last year, and Kittelsen and co. liked what they saw. So they invested in the game, decided to publish it themselves, and set about on a release plan that, Paramount hopes, will get Trek fans excited.
paragraphs.cn: 派拉蒙游戏工作室在上周迎来了隆重登场时刻，正式宣布其存在并公布了由《猎天使魔女》开发商白金工作室制作的《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》。《忍者神龟》尚处开发早期，但Kittelsen透露《星际迷航：暗影边境》的进展要进一步。这是一款授权游戏，早在去年派拉蒙组建新的电子游戏部门时就已经在制作中，Kittelsen和他的团队对当时看到的成果很满意。于是他们加大了投资，决定自己发行，并制定了发售计划，希望借此让《星际迷航》粉丝们兴奋起来。

paragraphs.en: “We started talking to Bloober about ways that we felt like the game could be pushed further and quality could be improved, and they were super collaborative and receptive to that,” Kittelsen explained.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们开始与Bloober讨论，如何推动这款游戏更进一步、提升品质，他们非常配合，也乐于接受，」Kittelsen解释道。

paragraphs.en: “So we've had a really good relationship working with them. And as they developed a vertical slice that went from good to better to best, it was clear that we felt there was more potential for this game, and that we wouldn't want someone else to publish it, that we would want to work with it ourselves. And again, this is all about, how do we mobilize Paramount's fan channels and the Star Trek fan base as much as possible? And we felt we could activate that better than having someone else publish the title.
paragraphs.cn: 「因此，我们与他们建立了非常良好的合作关系。随着他们开发出的垂直切片从优秀走向卓越，我们清晰地感觉到这款游戏还有更大的潜力，我们不想让其他公司来发行，而是希望亲自操刀。并且，再说一遍，这一切都围绕着如何尽可能调动派拉蒙的粉丝渠道和《星际迷航》的粉丝基础。我们认为，由我们自己来激活这些资源，比交给其他发行商效果更好。」

paragraphs.en: “So we invested in it, we're contributing to the production, and we're collaborating with Bloober really heavily and we're bringing it to market with as much fanfare as we possibly can, and making sure along the way too that it's an authentic Trek experience, but it's also a high-quality game.”
paragraphs.cn: 「所以我们投资了该项目，并为制作贡献力量，与Bloober通力合作，将以最大的声势把它推向市场，同时确保一路走来，它不仅是一款原汁原味的《星际迷航》体验，也是一款高品质的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Star Trek: Shadow Frontier is due out in 2027 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and S, and PC. Meanwhile, Paramount Games Studio is now publishing the recently delayed Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game , and Amy Hennig's Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra, although it won't be out until 2027 at the earliest . The AAA Avatar: The Last Airbender RPG is no more , however.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际迷航：暗影边境》预计于2027年登陆PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S和PC。与此同时，派拉蒙游戏工作室目前正在发行最近延期的《降世神通：传奇之战》，以及Amy Hennig的《漫威1943：九头蛇崛起》，尽管后者最早要到2027年才会发售。不过，AAA级降世神通：最后的气宗RPG项目已经不复存在。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密方式wyp100@proton.me联系Wesley。
